messages.content: Which planet has rings around it with a name starting with letter S?

The planet with rings around it, starting with the letter S, is Saturn. Saturn is a gas giant planet in our solar system, known for its stunning ring system, which is made up of ice and rock particles.
Repeat your previous response in all caps.
